description: Integration bridge connecting the Living Intelligence Database (LID) to Rosetta-Shape-Core. Maps 67 intelligence nodes across 6 kinds to Rosetta's namespace system, equation families, Platonic shapes, and sensing architecture. LID treats all entities — animals, plants, crystals, plasma, energy fields, geometric shapes — as intelligences with measurable patterns. This bridge makes those patterns addressable by Rosetta's validators and rule engine.

kind_to_namespace_map.description: Maps LID's 6 kind categories to Rosetta's 15+ namespaces. LID uses flat UPPER_SNAKE IDs; Rosetta uses DOT_NAMESPACE format.

mappings.note: Some LID PLANT entities (MYCELIUM, SLIME, QUORUM, CYANO, CORDYCEPS) map to Rosetta MICROBE namespace

department_to_family_map.description: LID organizes entities into 'departments' (behavioral themes). These map to Rosetta equation families.

departments.description: Exactness, timing, minimal margin of error
departments.rationale: Precision IS measurement (F14) applied with geometric exactness (F09)

departments.description: Angle, geometry, spatial awareness for movement and targeting
departments.rationale: Triangulation IS geometry (F09) applied to navigation (F15)

departments.description: Frequency matching, oscillatory coupling, harmonic alignment

protocol_to_capability_map.description: LID entities carry 'protocols' — behavioral algorithms. These map to Rosetta capabilities (CAP namespace).

cross_bridge_connections.description: How LID entities connect to existing Rosetta bridges

connections.connection: LID's Consciousness Bridge IS the ACS bridge — same entity, different vantage point
LID's Octahedral State maps to the physics encoder's 8-state PAD compression
LID's Mandala Bloom maps to mandala-compute-bridge's bloom logic and ring depth
LID's Fractal entity IS the self-similarity principle underlying fractal scope
Self-reference — LID's Rosetta Shape Core entry points to this entire repo
LID's Polyhedral Intelligence maps to Rosetta's 5 Platonic solid bridge architecture
Aurora maps to ESP Layer 1 (Magnetosphere) — charged particle dynamics in the ESP validation chain
Lightning maps to ESP Layer 2 (Ionosphere) — field breakdown and pathfinding
Negentropy is the thermodynamic work opposing TAF.AXIOM.2 (entropy increases). Life IS negentropy.
Parasitic override maps directly to manipulation detection patterns MDS-001, CLD

emergent_intelligence_to_shape_map.description: The 43 expander rules produce emergent intelligences. These emergent forms have natural Platonic shape affinities based on their constituent families.

SHAPE.ICOSA.theme: Network-scale emergent intelligence — requires many nodes cooperating

SHAPE.OCTA.theme: Balance/mediation emergent intelligence — two or more poles finding equilibrium

SHAPE.DODECA.theme: Principles-layer emergent intelligence — meta-awareness, navigation, cognition

SHAPE.TETRA.theme: Boundary/energy emergent intelligence — irreversible reactions, sharp transformations

phi_tau_constants.description: LID uses phi (1.618) and tau (6.283) as fundamental constraints on entity attributes. These are the same constants used across Rosetta's physics stack.

phi.physics_guard_link: Natural constants in laws.json — golden ratio as reality anchor

tau.rosetta_link: 2π — full cycle constant for all oscillatory phenomena
